issues.title: Railway deployment not executed
issues.description: Backend is deployable but has not been deployed to Railway. Needs production env vars.

issues.title: Expo production build not tested
issues.description: Mobile app compiles (0 TS errors, 39 screens) but no EAS production build or physical device test.

issues.title: OpenClaw bot needs Discord token
issues.description: 7 skills built and API-verified, but bot cannot go live without Discord bot token + Anthropic API key.

issues.title: Harris County LIDAR not downloaded
issues.description: Tree canopy height model needed for course obstacle mapping. Source: TNRIS.

issues.title: Mapbox native build not tested
issues.description: Map screen works in code but requires native build (npx expo run:ios) to render. Expo Go cannot load @rnmapbox/maps.
